name: Endeavour Group Limited
analysis: EDV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.2300, stop A$2.7819, target A$3.6075 (0.84:1) — then trail it.
